dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: I don't like my mind right now.

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: I'm holding on, but everything is so heavy.

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: So much more than I can carry.

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: WOW!

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: They're so cool!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: JUGYEONG, TURN DOWN THE VOLUME!

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: Oh, okay~

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: My life as a senior in middle school is really good.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: I can listen to whatever music I like.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: And I can watch as many cartoons and movies as I want.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Hey!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: DAMN IT! Hey!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Huh?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Sorry!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: We called you so many times. Why didn't you answer us, you freaking loser?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Jeez.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Ugh.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Hey, go get us some dumplings.

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: Dumplings... Ah! O-Okay!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Snack Bar

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Dumplings for Jeonghye.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Kimchi Dumplings.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: For Min-aa.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Beef Dumplings for Jeonghye.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Kimchi Dumplings for Min-aa.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Beef Dumplings for Jeonghye.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Kimchi Dumplings for Min-aa.

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: One kimchi dumpling and one beef dumpling, please!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Wow, thank you~!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Aside from a few inconveniences at school, I'm getting along very well.

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: Beef. Kimchi. Hope these are the right ones.

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: The dumplings! Oh, oh no! Ouch!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN GUY
dialogue.line: Oh shoot! Sorry about that~

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN GUY
dialogue.line: You seem to have tripped on my long, beautiful legs~

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN GUY
dialogue.line: I was just sitting here for a minute feeling lonely. Sorry~

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: T-That's okay! Haha, your legs are really long.

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: Ah, is this that famous guy from the cafeteria...?

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: Wait! That music. Is that Marilyn Manson?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN GUY
dialogue.line: Uh, hey! That's my MP3 player.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN GUY
dialogue.line: Haha, you have great taste in music.

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: Thank you!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The guy from the cafeteria I sometimes run into knows all about the rock or metal bands that I like.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN GUY
dialogue.line: Haha, hey! Linkin Park today? Ah, yeah!

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: Nice! It's Green Day today~

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN GUY
dialogue.line: Oh, it's Marilyn Manson today~

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: I think that guy and I get along really well together!

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: He always says hi whenever he sees me.

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: Maybe he likes me.

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: I can't take this!

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: Bet he would like this.

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: Hehe, I have to give him this today.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Oh my god!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Really~?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Of course, Semi! You and that guy from the cafeteria are dating, aren't you?

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: Stop it! You're making me... hehe.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Nana!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: What?!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Guys are talking. Did you take a picture together with him?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: XX Middle School's Semi Lee, Hottie! You really are a goddess.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: It must be nice to be so pretty.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Wow, that picture looks amazing!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Haha, really?

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: This can't be.

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: THE DEVIL!

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: We have the same tastes. We have so much in common.

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: Maybe that's why I got the crazy idea into my head that things might go well with him!

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: Semi the Hottie. Semi the Hottie.

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: I knew my face was a problem! No one would ever like an ugly, ordinary girl like me.

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: Mom!

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: Get me an eye lift job as fast as possible!

dialogue.speaker: Mom
dialogue.line: Oh, what's she talking about?

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong's Sister
dialogue.line: Mom, I think Jugyeong has hit puberty.

dialogue.speaker: Mom
dialogue.line: A young middle schooler asking for plastic surgery? Is that what you said?!

dialogue.speaker: Mom
dialogue.line: I wish you were even half as good as your older sister!

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong's Sister
dialogue.line: Yeah, honestly. You're not that pretty, sis. You'd be ugly even if you get an eye job, LOL.

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: This is so unfair! What about you, Mom? Why did you make her and Jugyeong look good and me ugly??? You always told me I was adopted, was that right? True, that's you! I hate you!

dialogue.speaker: Mom
dialogue.line: Oh, what the heck has gotten into her all of a sudden?!

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong's Sister
dialogue.line: She's at that age when she's sensitive about her looks~ Try to understand, Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Mom
dialogue.line: Totally. But it's true that she's the only ugly one. Why was she born like that?

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong's Sister
dialogue.line: Ugh, you stay out of this!

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: Jeez.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Social Media

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: I shouldn't have gotten so mad at Mom like that.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Today, anonymous. Depressed. Feeling left out. I have a crush on a guy. We have a lot in common. I thought things might turn out well. But there's one thing wrong. I thought I was pretty. That's totally wrong! This is so depressing. Being ugly, he likes...?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: 30 minutes later

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: Are there any comments?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Sorry, but honestly, a person's face is pretty important.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Don't you know how to use makeup? I look totally different before and after makeup, haha. I'm super ugly, but with makeup, I get really confident. Check out this link.

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: Oh? Is this it?

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: I wonder what it is.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: http://mbboomnaver.com/ BBOOM POPULAR NEW VIDEOS CHEONBBOOM GANGDAN THE MIRACLE OF USING MAKEUP

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: Wow! That's it! This is just what I need!

summary: Six years earlier, Jugyeong struggles with her self-image and a crush on a boy who shares her music taste, leading to a family argument about her looks. Feeling ugly and rejected, she finds solace and a new path in a social media comment suggesting makeup.
